parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'evaluate_all', entityIds: $json.entityIds, year: new Date().getFullYear() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const summary = $('Call Scheduler — Evaluate All').first().json.summary || {}; const dashboard = $('Get Dashboard Metrics').first().json || {}; const now = new Date(); const weekStart = new Date(now); weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - 7); const overdueList = (summary.overdue || []).map(e => `• ${e.name} (${e.entityType}) — ${e.daysOverdue} days overdue`).join('\n') || 'None'; const atRiskList = (summary.atRisk || []).map(e => `• ${e.name} — ${e.risk} risk (${e.status})`).join('\n') || 'None'; const upcomingList = (summary.upcomingDeadlines || []).map(e => `• ${e.name} — ${e.daysUntilDeadline} days (${e.deadline})`).join('\n') || 'None'; const html = `

PA CROP — Weekly Compliance Digest

Week of ${weekStart.toLocaleDateString()} — ${now.toLocaleDateString()}

Portfolio Summary

Total entities:${summary.total || 0}
Status distribution:${JSON.stringify(summary.byStatus || {})}
Risk distribution:LOW: ${(summary.byRisk||{}).LOW||0} · MED: ${(summary.byRisk||{}).MEDIUM||0} · HIGH: ${(summary.byRisk||{}).HIGH||0} · CRIT: ${(summary.byRisk||{}).CRITICAL||0}

${(summary.overdue||[]).length > 0 ? '🚨' : '✅'} Overdue Entities

${overdueList}

⚠️ At-Risk Entities

${atRiskList}

📅 Upcoming Deadlines (30 days)

${upcomingList}

System Health

Upstash: ${dashboard.systemHealth?.upstashConnected ? '✅' : '❌'} · Rules: v${dashboard.rulesVersion || '?'} · Engine: ${dashboard.systemHealth?.complianceEngine ? '✅' : '❌'}

Chat questions today: ${dashboard.metrics?.chatQuestions || 0} · Escalations: ${dashboard.metrics?.chatEscalations || 0}

— PA CROP Compliance Engine · Admin Dashboard

`; return [{ json: { html, subject: `PA CROP Weekly Digest: ${summary.total || 0} entities · ${(summary.overdue||[]).length} overdue · ${(summary.atRisk||[]).length} at-risk` } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'PA CROP Services <ops@pacropservices.com>', to: 'polycarpohu@gmail.com', subject: $json.subject, html: $json.html }) }}
